input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
# India vs Pakistan result?
with open('articles/2026/02/14/articles.jsonl') as f:
    for line in f:
        a = json.loads(line)
        title = (a.get('title','') or '').lower()
        if ('india' in title and 'pakistan' in title) or ('ronda rousey' in title) or ('state of the union' in title):
            print(a.get('title','')[:160])
" | head -15
